title: Venezuelan Corn Cachapas
description: A delicious corn pancake dish from Venezuela, perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the cornmeal and cachapas.
Gradually add in the water and mix until a thick batter forms.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the skillet.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve hot with your favorite toppings.
